1062.issue: [E1062] js-controller dependency missing. js-controller 6.0.11 is required as minimum. Please add to dependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json).

1090.issue: [E1090] admin dependency missing. admin 7.6.17 is required as minimum, 7.6.20 is recommended. Please add to globalDependencies at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json).

2004.issue: [E2004] Version "1.1.0" listed at common.news at [io-package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/io-package.json) does not exist at [NPM](https://www.npmjs.com/package/iobroker.wireless-settings). Please remove from news section.

0066.issue: [W0066] "@types/node":"^22.7.4" at [package.json](https://github.com/ioBroker/ioBroker.wireless-settings/blob/master/package.json) allows major version greater than 20. Downgrade to node.js 20.x.x to avoid wrong typing is recommended.
